heading: Data Transfer
body:
Atlas Stream Processing data transfer costs depend on the relationship between
the origin region and the destination.

| Data Transfer Type  | Price per GB     |
| ------------------- | ---------------- |
| Same Region         | No charge        |
| Same Continent      | $0.02 to $0.16   |
| Different Continent | $0.05 to $0.16   |
| Out to Internet     | $0.087 to $0.181 |
